name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: An initiative by the government of India that provides direct income support to small and marginal farmers.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year direct income support, paid in three equal installments of ₹2,000.
documents_needed: Land ownership documents / Land cultivation proof

name: Karnataka Farmer Old Age Pension
ministry: Revenue Department, Government of Karnataka
description: A state-specific pension scheme for senior farmers in Karnataka.
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹1,000.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: Government sponsored crop insurance scheme integrating multiple stakeholders on a single platform.
benefits: Comprehensive insurance cover against crop failure, helping in stabilizing the income of the farmers.
documents_needed: Sowing Certificate issued by Patwari/Gram Sevak

name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Maan-dhan Yojana (PM-KMY)
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: A voluntary and contributory pension scheme for small and marginal farmers in India.
benefits: Assured monthly pension of ₹3,000 after attaining the age of 60 years.
documents_needed: Savings Bank Account / Jan Dhan Account

name: National Higher Education Scholarship
ministry: Ministry of Education
description: Financial support for meritorious students from low-income families to pursue higher education.
benefits: ₹20,000 per year scholarship support for undergraduate/postgraduate studies.
documents_needed: Mark sheets of previous qualifying examinations

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC/ST Students
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Financial assistance to SC and ST student groups to complete their post-matriculation or post-secondary courses.
benefits: 100% tuition fee waiver, along with a monthly academic maintenance allowance.

name: Central Sector Interest Subsidy Scheme (CSIS)
ministry: Ministry of Education
description: Scheme to provide interest subsidy during the period of moratorium on education loans for professional/technical courses.
benefits: Full interest subsidy on bank education loans during the study course plus 1 year moratorium.
documents_needed: Proof of admission to certified technical/professional course
Income Certificate showing family income <= ₹4.5 Lakhs

name: PM Young Achievers Scholarship Award Scheme (YASASVI)
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Scholarships for students belonging to Other Backward Classes (OBC), Economically Backward Classes (EBC) and Nomadic Tribes.
benefits: Scholarship grant up to ₹75,000/year for Schooling (Class 9-10) and up to ₹1,25,000/year for Higher Secondary/College.

name: Mahila Samman Savings Certificate (MSSC)
ministry: Ministry of Finance
description: A small savings scheme for women and girls introduced in Budget 2023.
benefits: Fixed interest rate of 7.5% per annum compounded quarterly on deposits up to ₹2 Lakhs.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme (For Women Entrepreneurs)
ministry: Ministry of Finance
description: Bank loan scheme promoting entrepreneurship among women and SC/ST communities.
benefits: Composite bank loans from ₹10 Lakhs up to ₹1 Crore for setting up greenfield business enterprises.
documents_needed: Proof of business category (Greenfield enterprise status)

name: PM MUDRA Loan - Tarun Category (For Women)
ministry: Ministry of Finance
description: High-bracket business loan under MUDRA scheme tailored with processing preferences for women business owners.
benefits: Collateral-free business expansion loans between ₹5 Lakhs and ₹10 Lakhs.

name: Senior Citizens Savings Scheme (SCSS)
ministry: Ministry of Finance
description: A government-backed savings instrument offering quarterly interest payments to resident elders.
benefits: Safe high-yield interest rate (currently 8.2% per annum) on lump-sum deposits up to ₹30 Lakhs.
documents_needed: Age proof / Retired details (VRS/Superannuation receipt if applicable)

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
ministry: Ministry of Finance
description: Pension scheme for citizens focusing on unorganized sector workers.
benefits: Assured monthly pension ranging from ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 after attaining the age of 60.
documents_needed: Mobile number linked with bank account

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
ministry: Ministry of Rural Development
description: Pension program for senior citizens belonging to Below Poverty Line (BPL) households.
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹200 for citizens aged 60-79, and ₹500 for citizens aged 80 and above.
documents_needed: BPL Ration Card / Proof of poverty status

name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana (General)
ministry: Ministry of Finance
description: Loan scheme to provide credit to micro-units and small businesses.
benefits: Collateral-free business loans up to ₹10 Lakhs categorized as Shishu (up to 50k), Kishor (up to 5L), and Tarun (up to 10L).
documents_needed: Income tax returns or GST records (if applicable)

name: Credit Guarantee Scheme (CGTMSE)
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
description: Guarantees collateral-free credit facilities to micro and small enterprises.
benefits: Collateral-free credit support of up to ₹5 Crore for MSMEs via guarantor trust protection.

name: PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Special micro-credit facility scheme for providing affordable working capital loans to street vendors.
benefits: First collateral-free loan of ₹10,000, subsequent tranches of ₹20,000 and ₹50,000, plus 7% interest subsidy.
documents_needed: Certificate of Vending (CoV) / Letter of Recommendation from local municipal body

name: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maan-dhan (PM-SYM)
ministry: Ministry of Labour and Employment
description: A voluntary and contributory pension scheme for unorganized sector daily workers.
benefits: Assured monthly pension of ₹3,000 after attaining the age of 60.
documents_needed: Savings Bank Account / Jan Dhan Account Details

name: e-Shram Portal Registration Benefits
ministry: Ministry of Labour and Employment
description: National database mapping for unorganized workers to deliver social security benefits.
benefits: Accidental insurance cover of ₹2 Lakhs for accidental death and ₹1 Lakh for permanent disability, plus streamlined direct relief during emergencies.

name: Assistance to Disabled Persons (ADIP) Scheme
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Provides assistive aids and appliances to Persons with Disabilities (PwD) with 40% or more disability to improve their mobility and daily living.
benefits: Free assistive devices such as wheelchairs, hearing aids, artificial limbs, Braille kits, and other aids. Devices valued up to a government-set ceiling.
documents_needed: Disability Certificate (40% or above) from a Govt. Hospital

name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme (IGNDPS)
ministry: Ministry of Rural Development
description: Monthly pension for BPL persons with severe or multiple disabilities (80% or more disability).
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹300 from Central Govt. States may add a top-up (total varies by state, commonly ₹500-₹1,500/month).
documents_needed: Disability Certificate (80% or above) from a Govt. Hospital

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY)
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
description: A flagship scheme for focused and sustainable development of the fisheries sector with an investment of ₹20,050 crore.
benefits: Financial assistance for fishing vessels, cold storage, ice plants, fish feed, insurance premium support, and livelihood support during fishing ban periods.
documents_needed: Fisherman Identity Card / Marine Fishermen ID

name: Fishermen Group Accident Insurance Scheme
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
description: Group accident insurance scheme for active fishermen to provide insurance coverage against accidental death and permanent disability.
benefits: ₹5 Lakh for accidental death, ₹2.5 Lakh for permanent total disability. Annual premium is largely subsidized by the government.

name: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
description: End-to-end support to artisans and craftspeople through skills training, toolkit incentives, credit access, and market linkage for 18 identified traditional trades.
benefits: Up to ₹3 Lakh collateral-free credit at 5% interest, ₹15,000 toolkit incentive, free skill training with ₹500/day stipend, and PM Vishwakarma Certificate.
documents_needed: Self-declaration of trade (e.g. carpenter, blacksmith, goldsmith, potter, weaver)

name: Ambedkar Hastshilp Vikas Yojana (AHVY)
ministry: Ministry of Textiles (Office of Development Commissioner for Handicrafts)
description: Provides infrastructure, design, and marketing support to artisans through Self Help Groups (SHGs) to improve their income and market access.
benefits: Formation of artisan SHGs, design development workshops, participation in exhibitions and buyer-seller meets, and up to ₹50,000 working capital support per SHG (verify).

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY 4.0)
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
description: India's flagship skill training scheme enabling youth to take up industry-relevant skill training and become employable. PMKVY 4.0 includes on-the-job training and international skilling.
benefits: Free short-term skill training (150-300 hours) with government certification, training allowance of ₹8,000-₹10,000 on successful completion (verify), and placement assistance.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
ministry: Ministry of Rural Development
description: Placement-linked skill training programme for rural poor youth from BPL families, with guaranteed placement in jobs with a minimum CTC of ₹6,000/month or above (verify).
benefits: Free residential skill training (576 hours minimum), post-placement support for 12 months, and guaranteed employment with minimum wages.

name: Antyodaya Anna Yojana (AAY)
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
description: Provides highly subsidized food grains to the poorest of the poor families identified under BPL category.
benefits: 35 kg of food grains per month per family at ₹2/kg for wheat and ₹3/kg for rice.

name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY)
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
description: Provides free food grains to priority households and Antyodaya families under the National Food Security Act. Extended and merged into regular NFSA provisions from January 2024.
benefits: 5 kg of free food grains (rice/wheat) per person per month for all priority household card holders.
